titleStmt.title: SII 19.344: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 344. (A.R. No. 221 of 1907.) ON THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE.

summary.p: This inscription consists of a number of disconnected and mixed up pieces whose sequence cannot be made out on account of their damaged condition. Probably they are parts of two (or even more) different inscriptions, one of which seems to record a gift of land after purchase to two persons by name Koḍumuḍi Araṅgaṉ alias Bahulaviḍaṅgaṉ and Murugaḍi Paṭṭamuḍaiyāṉ alias Aiññūṟṟuva-Peruvachchaṉ and another who were to perform a (musical ?) play called Vaigaṟai-āṭṭam in the temple at Tiruviḍaimarudil. Another piece seems to village have formed part of an inscription recording the foundation of a new called Aiyapāḍi to the west of Enādimaṅgalam and the fixation of its boundaries by means of an elephant, before its grant free of all taxes to one Śembiyaṉ Śōḻiyavaraiyaṉ and his descendants progeny in perpetuity. Construction of terraced house for residence is referred to as a special right.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Pieces are arranged in sections according to the broad sense of the inscription.

svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4Āvatu tiruviṭaimaru
til śrīmula ṉ Etir meṟciya pperaiya to
ṉ piramanum mu kkuṟumpiluṭaiyāṉ kriṣṇaṉ pāri Aṭṭuvomāka vait talaiccamāṭu tiraimur yāṅkaḷuṭaiya Arccanābhogattu patma
hattu tevatāṉam Ināṭṭu Eyiṉma ṟṟum
vaiykaṟaiāṭṭattukku kku Uvaccak koṭumuṭi Araṅkaṉāṉa bahula- viṭaṅkaṉum murukampaṭṭa ṉā koṇṭa � ṉāl nicatam Aṭṭakkaṭava ney Āḻākkum
Uṇṇilamey nicatam pattāḷ cantrātittaval vaiykaṟai Āṭṭattukku vācikkakkaṭavomāṉom Ikkāṇiuṭaiya ko murukampaṭṭamuṭaiyāṉāṉa Aiññūṟṟuvapperuvaccaṉum Iv
poṉ nūṟṟu Eṇpatteḻu kaḻañcaraikku Uṭalāka
ḷiyamtum yā muṉ Ūṟṟuḷḷiṭṭa kaḷanāṭṭu nallāṭi muṉ kāṇiuṭaiyāṉai māṟṟi kārāṇmai miyāṭci Uḷḷaṭaṅka vaḷaiyiṟ cuṟṟumuṟṟum Uṇ
ṉūr Iṟaiyiliceyta nilattil nel koṇṭu tevakanmikaḷom Erippatāka cantirātittaval Oru nontā
ḻaiñcarai nūṟṟu kaḻañcarai poṉṉumaṭut cantirātittaval Iṟaiyiliyāka kallil veṭṭikkuṭutte
ṉ Aiññāṟṟuvap perumaccaṉum Ivviruvom
mu cantirātittaval Oru nontāviḷakkukkut ti tañcaraiyuṅ koṇṭu Ikka
ṟavuṟai ṟaituḷai Aṅkaḻañ tti
pottāka vā tu takame vari tantu Iṟātitākavum Ipparicoṭṭik kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom
sabhaiyom Ivvūr Ittevar maṉai Aintum Epperpaṭṭa ceṉ ṉirveṭṭi Uḷpaṭa Epperpaṭṭatuñ ce
ṭi talaiccamāṭākac cecu kuṭuttom Imuvom Inney taṇṭi Aṭṭuvittāṉaṭi Eṉṟalai melaṉa Ivai pa[ ṉmā] heśvararrakṣai .

kaṇṭu Etireḻuntu ceṉṟu toḻutu vi ṅka talaimel vaittu Ellai terittu piṭicūḻntu piṭākai naṭantu Aiyyapāṭi nilattu(ttu)kku kiḻpāṟkellai Enātimaṅkalattu miyellaiye teṟku nokki nālukāl Ellaikke ceṉṟu Enātimaṅkalattu Ellaikku meṟkiṉnum Ippāṅkā Ellaiye teṟkunokki murukkaṉkuṭi vāykkālāna śrīparāntakavāykkālukke ceṉṟu pāṅkā Ellaikku meṟkiṉnum
Ivvāykkāl vaṭakaraiye meṟku nokki ceṉṟu Ivvāykkāl niroṭukālukku vaṭak kiṉnum Ivvāykkāl menaṭai nirpāyap peṟuvatāka Itaṉai Ūṭaṟuttu teṉkaraikke Eṟu
laiyeyuṟṟu vaṭakkiṉnum Itaṉiṉṟum Ivvāykkāliṉ naṭuvey vaṭakkunokki po
�ṟvāykkāluḷpaṭa kiḻakkiṉnum Itiṉiṉṟum velaṅkuṭi Ellai varampu tāṉuḷḷavāṟey meṟkunokki ceṉṟu vaṭakkiṉnum teṟkunokki ceṉṟu Iṭai Oraṭi vāykkāle Uṟṟu meṟkiṉnum Ivvāykkāl meṉaṭai
uṟṟu vāykkāl pāti Uṭppaṭa meṟṟoṭṭattu Ellaikku meṟkiṉnum vāykkā liṉ mey to
kkuṭi putānāḷ tevar kkunokki ceṉṟu Amararacava Uṟṟu marutaṉiṉṟu Amararacavāykkaliṉ naṭuvey teṟkunokki ṉaṟukaraikke Eṟi koṟṟattukkuṭi miyellai pāmputā
ku nokki ceṉṟa nāṭṭu koṟṟa[ ttukku] llaiyeyuṟṟu
vāykkāl pāti Uṭppaṭa Eyikai llaikku meṟkiṉ num m kiḻakkunokkiy Eṟi koṟṟattu
ku nokkiceṉṟu Itaṉiṉṟum vaṭakkunokki poṉa vāyk[ kālukku]

ṭavarum kiṭaṅkum keṇiyum Ōṭaiyum Uṭaippum Āṟum Āṟiṭupaṭukaiyum miṉpayil paḷḷamum koṭṭakaraiyum puṟṟum teṟṟiyum kāṭum piṭilikaiyum kaḷarum
mal mum meṉokkiya maramum kiḻ nokkiya kiṇaṟum Uḷḷiṭṭu Uṭum poṭi Āmai tavaḻu m muṉṟu Iṭaiyānai kuṭaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka cempiyaṉ coḻiyavaraiyaṉukkum Ivaṉ va[ ṅśa] ttārkkum kāṇiyāy tiru viṭai nāṭāṭcciyum Ūrāṭcciyum putā nāḻiyum tiṟaiyum kaṇṇālakkāṇamum karumpūr kulamum taṟippuṭavaiyum maṉṟupāṭum Iṟaiyum niyo nallāṭu nallerutu vālamañciyu rum Iṭakkūliyum Ūrkaḻañcum Uḷḷiṭṭu kottoṭṭu tevvakaip paṭṭitum kaikkoḷḷātatākavum peṟṟatukku peṟṟa I nilattukku nirkkiñcavāṟu vāykkālukku cca peṟuvatāka
ykāl Aṉṉar kuṟaṅkaṟuttu kuttavum kuṟṟettam paṇṇavum kūṭainir Iṟaikkavum vilaṅkiṭaikkavum peṟātatākavum ceṉṉir potuvinṉai ce
potu Annir Aṭaiccu pāccapeṟuvatākavum taṭṭoṭṭāl māṭamāḷikai Eṭukkap peṟuvatākavum turavu kaṇṇāṟu Iḻiccappeṟuvatākavum kāvum teṅkum Iṭapeṟuvatākavum tamaṉakamum Iruvāciyum maruvum ceṇpakamum ceṅkaḻunirum māvum palāvum kamukum paṉaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa ruvil payaṉ maramum naṭavum Iṭavum peṟuvatākavum Iṭṭa teṅkum paṉaiyum Īḻamu ṟapeṟātatākavum peruñcekkiṭapeṟuvatāka yilu cuṟṟukkarai veṭṭikkoḷḷa peṟuvatākavum puṟavūr nilattuḷ vantu pāya Uṭaiya niṟaimai vantu pāyavum vāravum peṟuvatākavum Ippaṭippaṭṭa viyavasthai- Oṭu parahārattomum kuṭinikkā tevatāṉa Iṟaiiliyāka piṭicūḻntu paṭākai naṭantu kallum kaḷḷiyum Iṭṭu Aṟaiyolai yeḻuti

ñcoti paṭṭālaki nu llamparuṭaiyāṉ kuṉṟakaṇ tattaṉ vāyintaṉ vāy kaṇṇāṟṟil kāṟceyyiṉ meṟkkaṭaiya Araikkāṟ ceyyu
[�]tittanum varipottakakaṇakku neṟkuṉṟamuṭaiyāṉ
�m Itu panmaheśvara[rakṣai]
perunakarattom Itu candrādittaval panmāheśvararakṣai ..
kkum māttāṇṭa kāttāṉaṭi
ta māttāṇṭa mā Itu panmāheśvararakṣai
teṉ ñcā tiruvabhiṣega
Digital edition of SII 19.344 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
